metadata.title: When Will I Get My Social Security Check? | Payment Date Checker
metadata.description: Estimate when you will get your Social Security check by benefit type, birthday range, and month. No SSN, bank information, or login required.

hero.title: When Will I Get My Social Security Check?
hero.description: For most recipients, your scheduled date depends on your birthday range. Use the checker below for a quick estimate.
hero.tip: Independent tool. Not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Social Security Administration.

checker.title: Estimate when your check is scheduled
checker.description: Choose the situation that matches you. The checker does not ask for your SSN, full birthday, bank information, or login.

guide.title: What determines your payment date
guide.description: The main difference is whether you receive regular Social Security only, SSI only, both benefits, or Social Security that began before May 1997.

image.alt: Find my Social Security check date

items.title: Birthday range
items.description: Most post-May-1997 Social Security payments are scheduled by birthday range.

items.title: Both benefits
items.description: People receiving both Social Security and SSI often have two scheduled dates.

items.title: Bank posting
items.description: Your bank or Direct Express posting time can differ from the scheduled date.

faq.title: Payment date questions
faq.description: Helpful context before you rely on a date estimate.

items.question: Do I need my exact birthday?
items.answer: No. This checker only uses birthday ranges: 1-10, 11-20, or 21-31.

items.question: Can I use this for disability or survivors benefits?
items.answer: Yes, if your payment follows the standard Social Security schedule. Some special cases may differ, so confirm unusual situations with SSA.

items.question: Does this mean the money is in my bank account?
items.answer: No. It estimates the scheduled payment date. Your bank or Direct Express card may have separate posting timing.

cta.title: Check the date for your situation
cta.description: Use the payment date checker and avoid entering sensitive information anywhere except official channels.
